sources.title: Radar Men From The Moon
sources.description: This Serial has fallen into the Public Domain.

sources.title: Radar Men from the Moon - 1952 - All Episodes - TV Serial - Maraton - Chapters 1-12
sources.description:
Jet‑pack justice meets lunar lunacy as Commando Cody rockets from lab coat to lift‑off to stop a Moon‑made meltdown on Earth!

00:00 all episodes chapter 1 - Moon Rocket
20:07 Chapter 2 - Molten Terror
32:07 Chapter 3-  Bridge of Death
44:19 Chapter 4 - Flight to Destruction
56:28 Chapter 5 - Murder Car
1:08:40 Chapter 6 - Hills of Death
1:20:51 Chapter 7 - Camouflaged Destruction
1:33:02 Chapter 8 - The Enemy Planet
1:45:13 Chapter 9 - Battle in the Stratosphere
1:57:24 Chapter 10 - Mass Execution
2:09:38 Chapter 11 - Planned Pursuit
2:21:45 Chapter 12 - Death of the Moon Man

When strategic sites on Earth start popping like flashbulbs, inventor‑hero Commando Cody traces the mystery blasts to Retik, the calculating Ruler of the Moon. Cody, with Joan Gilbert and Ted Richards at his side, blasts off in a streamlined rocket to confront Retik’s plan to “soften up” Earth using lunarium‑powered ray tech. Back home, Cody duels Retik’s on‑Earth agent Krog and human heavies Graber and Daly through airborne dogfights, cafe dust‑ups, and cliff‑side pursuits. A second trip to the Moon nets Cody a captured ray cannon and the proof he needs to turn the tide. With the clock ticking on a full‑scale lunar relocation, Cody aims his jet‑pack skills and brainy gadgets at shutting down Retik’s grand design once and for all.

⭐️ STARRING
George D. Wallace (Commando Cody)
Aline Towne (Joan Gilbert)
Roy Barcroft (Retik, Ruler of the Moon)
William Bakewell (Ted Richards)
Clayton Moore (Graber)
Peter Brocco (Krog)
Bob Stevenson (Daly)
Don Walters (Agent Henderson)

🎬 CREW CREDITS
Directed by Fred C. Brannon (Zombies of the Stratosphere, Flying Disc Man from Mars)
Written by Ronald Davidson (The Crimson Ghost, Zombies of the Stratosphere)
Cinematography by John MacBurnie
Special Effects by Howard & Theodore Lydecker (King of the Rocket Men, The Crimson Ghost)
Stunt Team: Tom Steele, Dale Van Sickel

🎯 WHY WATCH?
Jet‑pack heroics, ray‑cannon showdowns, and weekly cliffhangers—pure serial adrenaline!
Clayton Moore (future “The Lone Ranger”) rides as a hard‑charging heavy—pre‑mask legend!
Analog miniatures and wire‑rig flights by the Lydecker brothers—practical‑effects candy 🍬

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics
 • Action • Sci‑Fi • Serial • Adventure • Space Opera • Cult • Retro • Pulp •

sources.title: Radar Men from the Moon (1952) 12-CHAPTER CLIFFHANGER
sources.description:
PizzaFLIX Marathon Edition! Complete 12-chapter Cliffhanger!
Starring: George D. Wallace, Aline Towne, Clayton Moore
Directed by: Fred C. Brannon

When strategic targets on Earth are destroyed by a mysterious force, it's time to call civilian researcher and inventor Commando Cody.

🍕CHAPTERS🍕
0:00       PizzaFLIX Intro
1:04       Moon Rocket
21:09    Molten Terror
34:35     Bridge of Death
48:02     Flight to Destruction
1:01:27  Murder Car
1:14:54  Hills of Death
1:28:21  Camouflaged Destruction
1:41:47  The Enemy Planet
1:55:14  Battle in the Stratosphere
2:08:39  Mass Execution
2:22:06  Planned Pursuit
2:35:32  Death of the Moon Man
2:48:57  Please Subscribe!

metadata.Plot: Strategic targets on Earth are being destroyed by an unknown weapon. Government security head Henderson suspects it's an "atomic ray" originating from the moon! He assigns Commando Cody, scientist and man of action with a secret flying suit, to investigate. Soon, Cody is battling Earth thugs in the pay of Krog the moon man and making trips in his experimental rocket to the moon itself, in a perilous and all but singlehanded effort to thwart the planned invasion of Earth.
metadata.Actors: George D. Wallace, Aline Towne, Roy Barcroft
